title: kalimeris piccolii
intro: Kalimeris piccolii, also known as Chinese aster or Chinese daisy, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Kalimeris piccolii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. Kalimeris piccolii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its aerial parts can also be used to make medicinal extracts and tinctures.
